root.speaker: npc
root.text: Sap co xoai cat khong con?

options.label: Da con, xoai chin cay ngot lam a!
Con xoai xanh de an chua thoi a.
Da 40 ngan 1 ky, ngot re gion a!

ask_sour.speaker: npc
ask_sour.text: Xoai xanh cham muoi ot cung duoc, cho toi it nhe.

options.label: Da con can lien cho co/chu!
Da het xoai xanh roi a.

ask_amount.speaker: npc
ask_amount.text: Vay can cho toi 1 ky nhe, mua ve chia ca nha an.

options.label: Da con can du 1 ky cho co/chu!
Da xoai chin sap het roi a.

leaf_buy_small.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_small.text: Cho 0.8 ky xoai xanh thoi, du an roi.

leaf_buy_medium.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_medium.text: 1.2 ky nha, can can than kheo dap dap.

leaf_decline_price.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_price.text: Troi oi mac vay, thoi toi qua sap khac coi sao.

leaf_decline_stock.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_stock.text: Vay a, thoi luc khac ghe lai vay.
